entry.title: 【磁力下载】[RJ01392979]Gensou Brothel:Tengu Quarte 幻想娼馆 -天狗之廓【多语言】
entry.content:
游戏介绍

Purchase Page：Click Here

Release Date：Jun/24/2026 0
Supported Languages：Chinese Simplified Chinese Traditional Japanese English
Genre：Cross-section View Touhou Project Sex Industry / Soapland Discipline Futanari / Hermaphrodite

A brothel management simulation game brought to life with Live2D!

Tsukasa has caught you at a disadvantage, leaving you with a massive debt and forcing you into the role of a brothel owner on Youkai Mountain.

Daytime Actions (Daily Life Scenes)

  • Daytime represents the action turn before the brothel opens.

Nighttime Actions (Brothel Management Scenes)

  • Nighttime is when the brothel opens, and you assign courtesans to visiting clients.

Training / Service Scenes

  • Initiate individual animated scenes by engaging in intimate encounters during daily life scenes or by assigning characters to clients during management scenes.

Character Stats

  • Enhance character statistics by spending experience points earned through daytime and nighttime actions.

Item Purchases / Investments

  • Use money earned from brothel management to purchase upgrade items or make investments in the brothel.

(Text: English / Voice: Japanese)


截图
